# MeetMarkdown

> Free online markdown tools — format, convert, diff, and analyze markdown.

## Tools

- Formatter: Auto-format markdown with consistent spacing and aligned tables
- Markdown to HTML: Convert markdown to clean, semantic HTML
- HTML to Markdown: Convert HTML to clean, readable markdown
- Word Count & Stats: Word count, character count, reading time, heading structure
- Markdown Diff: Compare two markdown documents line by line
- Table Formatter: Align and clean up GFM markdown tables
- Markdown to PDF: Render markdown as a styled PDF (browser only)
- Mermaid Live Editor: Write and export Mermaid diagrams (browser only)
- Marp Slide Editor: Create markdown presentations (browser only)
- URL to Markdown: Fetch any URL as markdown (uses r.jina.ai)

## API

REST API available at https://meetmarkdown.com/api/v1/

Endpoints:
- POST /api/v1/format — Format markdown
- POST /api/v1/to-html — Convert markdown to HTML
- POST /api/v1/html-to-markdown — Convert HTML to markdown
- POST /api/v1/word-count — Analyze markdown statistics
- POST /api/v1/diff — Compare two markdown documents
- POST /api/v1/table-format — Format markdown tables

All endpoints accept JSON. 100KB input limit. Rate limited to 60 req/min.

## Docs

- API documentation: https://meetmarkdown.com/developers
- OpenAPI spec: https://meetmarkdown.com/.well-known/openapi.json
